## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Calculation change (please cite your source)
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` succeeds (no type errors)
- [ ] Tested the affected steps in the browser
- [ ] UI strings are in Turkish; code/comments are in English
- [ ] For calculation changes: the source/rule is referenced above
